summary: Completed frontend testing of CastleAdmin app. Login page loads correctly with all UI elements, but authentication flow is broken despite successful Supabase API calls.

critical_bugs.issue: User authentication succeeds at API level (HTTP 200 from Supabase) and auth token is stored in cookies, but frontend redirect logic fails to redirect user to dashboard
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot access the application despite valid credentials
critical_bugs.technical_details: Supabase auth API returns 200, token stored as 'sb-xnkdeuvbtswpiysnhnea-auth-token' in cookies, but signIn function in AuthContext likely throws error preventing redirect execution

integration_issues.issue: Authentication successful but no redirect occurs

passed_tests: Login page displays all required UI elements (email, password, sign in button)
CastleAdmin branding and welcome text display correctly
Dashboard is properly protected (redirects to login when accessed directly)
Form accepts demo credentials without validation errors
Auth token gets stored in browser cookies
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the authentication flow in AuthContext.tsx - the signIn function is likely throwing an error despite successful Supabase API response, preventing the redirect to dashboard. Debug the signIn method and ensure proper error handling.
